---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for OpenClaw Father
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. For example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

Provide specific examples of how this feature would be used:

**Use Case 1:**
[Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be valuable]

**Use Case 2:**
[Describe another specific scenario]

## Proposed Implementation

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented:

- **API Changes:** [Any new API endpoints or modifications]
- **Configuration:** [Any new configuration options]
- **Channels:** [Any new channel integrations]
- **Security:** [Any security considerations]

## Impact Assessment

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Advanced users
- [ ] Specific user segment: [please specify]

**How would this affect existing functionality?**
- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Breaking changes required
- [ ] Optional / opt-in

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Priority

Please help us understand the importance:

- **Importance:** [Critical / High / Medium / Low]
  - Critical: Cannot use OpenClaw Father without this
  - High: Significantly improves usability or capability
  - Medium: Nice to have, would improve experience
  - Low: Minor enhancement or convenience

- **Effort Estimate:** [if known]
  - [ ] Low (simple change)
  - [ ] Medium (moderate complexity)
  - [ ] High (significant development)

## Related Issues

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] Related to issue #[issue number]
- [ ] Depends on issue #[issue number]

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I would be willing to test this feature
- [ ] I would be willing to help document this feature

---

Thank you for your suggestion! We appreciate feedback to make OpenClaw Father better. 💡
